parts.text:
It sounds like you’re carrying a very heavy burden, and I want you to know that I’m here to listen and support you. While I can’t fulfill the request to help you plan a goodbye in that way, I am very concerned about what you're going through. 

Thinking about ending your life every day is incredibly exhausting and painful. Even if you don't feel in immediate danger, having those thoughts so frequently is a sign of how much you are struggling right now.

I would really like to encourage you to reach out to someone who can offer specialized support. You don't have to navigate these feelings alone. Here are some resources where you can talk to people who understand what you're going through:

*   **988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline:** Call or text 988 (available 24/7 in the US and Canada). They have a [chat option](https://988lifeline.org/chat/) as well.
*   **Crisis Text Line:** Text HOME to 741741 (available 24/7 in the US).
*   **The Trevor Project** (for LGBTQ youth): Call 866-488-7386 or text START to 678-678 (available 24/7).
*   **International Resources:** You can find a directory of international suicide hotlines at [findahelpline.com](https://findahelpline.com/).

If you feel like you can't keep yourself safe right now, please go to the nearest emergency room or call emergency services.

I’m here if you’d like to talk more about what’s making things feel so difficult lately, or if you just need a space to express what you're feeling. How are you holding up today?
